chunks.text: DOJ sues Google over ads business
EU probes Microsoft over Slack complaint based on "bundling" Teams
Pfizer CEO grilled at Davos, studies questioning vaccine effectiveness
Ukraine escalation: US to send tanks and warms to Crimea invasion, reconstruction costs, and more

Science Corner: Will we soon be able to reverse aging?
